name: Mama Lorraine's Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1 In a very large mixing bowl, add water and yeast.
2 Dissolve yeast. Add honey and oil. Stir well.
3 Gradually add flour, one cup at a time until dissolved, then add the rest to make a bread dough consistency.
4 Transfer dough from the bowl to a floured surface. Knead for about five minutes.
5 Shape into a ball and place in a greased bowl. Cover and let rise in a warm place for an hour.
6 Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7 On a greased cookie sheet, flatten the dough evenly.
8 Fold the edges up on the sides.
9 Place in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
10 Remove from the oven. Add toppings and sauce.
11 Continue cooking at 350-375°F (175-190°C) until cheese is browned. If browning occurs too quickly, cook for a longer time at a lower temperature.
